title: lahaya latifolia
intro: Lahaya latifolia, also known as the Philippine or Java ash tree, is a deciduous tree native to tropical regions of Asia. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lahaya latifolia include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal medicine, and its leaves can be dried and made into tea or powder for consumption.
